title: Audit Event
description: Defines structural audit evidence for governed AI execution.

version.description: Version of this audit event shape.

trace_id.description: Correlation ID linking this event to a full journey trace.

requester.description: Requester or actor associated with the event.

agent_id.description: Agent ID related to the event.

skill_id.description: Skill ID related to the event.

policy_id.description: Policy ID related to the event.

tool_id.description: Tool ID related to the event.

workflow_id.description: Workflow ID related to the event.

system_id.description: System ID related to the event.

context_scope_id.description: Context scope ID related to the event.

evaluation_id.description: Evaluation ID related to the event.

policy_decision.description: Policy decision associated with the event.

side_effects.description: Side-effect category associated with the event.

data_classes.description: Data classes involved in the event.

evidence.description: Public-safe evidence metadata. Avoid raw sensitive data.

kill_switch.description: Kill-switch evidence when a capability is blocked or disabled.
